title: The Truth about mRNA Vaccines
author: Ansovini R
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: All RNA viruses, by entering the host cell, secure their own reproduction because its RNA is attached to the enzyme "RT - reverse transcriptase" to form an immediate "DNA library" that will be incorporated into the genome of the host cell by another enzyme - the "integrase".
steps_raw: All RNA viruses, by entering the host cell, secure their own reproduction because its RNA is attached to the enzyme "RT - reverse transcriptase" to form an immediate "DNA library" that will be incorporated into the genome of the host cell by another enzyme - the "integrase".
